debug_info.goal:
q ε : ℝ
E : StaticElectricField 1
⊢ E.GaussLaw ε Electromagnetism.OneDimVacuum.chargeDistribution ↔ ∃ m, E = constD 1 m

rw [StaticElectricField.GaussLaw, chargeDistribution]
  simp [div_eq_mul_inv, mul_zero]
  exact ⟨fun h => ⟨E.eval 0, fun x => by simpa using h x⟩, fun ⟨m, hm⟩ => by simp [hm]⟩

constructor
  · intro h
    have h' := h
    simp only [chargeDistribution, zero_apply] at h'
    have h'' := StaticElectricField.gaussLaw_eq_zero_iff h'
    cases' h'' with m hm
    exact ⟨m, hm⟩
  · rintro ⟨m, rfl⟩
    simp [StaticElectricField.gaussLaw_const]
